runtime.description: Coding agent CLI runtime to execute. Supported values are claude or codex or opencode. Defaults to claude.

model.description: Model ID to use for this skill (agent-specific).

args.description: Additional CLI arguments to pass to the agent (e.g. --dangerously-skip-permissions for claude).

name.description: Workflow name used for grouping run sessions under ~/.local/share/skill-loop/<name>/. When omitted the config filename is used.

schedule.description: Optional cron schedule in standard 5-field crontab syntax. When set skill-loop stays resident and runs the workflow on each matching time.

router.description: Shared router agent configuration used to choose the next route when a skill has multiple next routes.

default_entrypoint.description: Default skill to start the loop with. Must exist in the skills map.

max_iterations.description: Maximum number of loop iterations before stopping. Defaults to 100 if omitted.

idle_timeout_seconds.description: Idle timeout in seconds for each skill execution before restart. Defaults to 900 (15 minutes).

max_restarts.description: Maximum automatic restarts per skill execution when idle timeout is exceeded. Defaults to 2. Set 0 to disable automatic restarts.

skills.description: Map of skill names to their definitions.

id.description: Stable route identifier returned by the router agent.

criteria.description: Judgment criteria used by the router agent when deciding whether this route should be chosen.

skill.description: Target skill name to route to. Mutually exclusive with done.

done.description: Terminate the workflow when this route is selected. Mutually exclusive with skill.

agent.description: Agent configuration for this skill. runtime defaults to claude when omitted.

next.description: Route options available after this skill runs. If more than one route exists then the shared router agent selects one by id.

title: skill-loop
description: Schema for skill-loop YAML configuration files (skill-loop.yml)
